name: Employment
description: Job listings, recruiting, workforce services. Campaigns promoting employment opportunities or employment-related services.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US EEOC / Title VII
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Prohibits targeting by race, sex, age (40+), religion, national origin, or disability in employment advertising.

regulatory_frameworks.name: EU Employment Equality Directive
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Prohibits discrimination in employment advertising on the basis of religion, disability, age, or sexual orientation.

guidance: Age targeting is particularly sensitive in employment. US ADEA protects workers 40+. Many jurisdictions prohibit age-based exclusions in job advertising even when the employer has age-based hiring preferences.
